summary: Lane A SHC scheduled launch dispatched and produced an openagents_shc fallbackLeaseIntent. closeDecision.reason: Full M10 acceptance now has Lane A terminal closeout and accepted review evidence plus Lane B accepted live closeout evidence, with zero-spend funding state and public-safe refs.
